title: Nio to report Q1 2024 earnings on Jun 6
text: NIO reported unaudited financial results for first quarter on Thursday, June 6 before US stock market opens with management hosting earnings call at 8:00 am US Eastern Time. Q1 2024 vehicle deliveries reached 30,053 units, hitting lowered guidance of about 30,000. Deliveries down 3.18% year-over-year and 39.95% from Q4 2023. NIO initially guided first-quarter vehicle deliveries range 31,000-33,000 units when announcing Q4 2023 results on March 5. Guided first-quarter revenue between RMB 10.499 billion ($1.479 billion) and RMB 11.087 billion. On March 27, NIO lowered first-quarter delivery guidance to about 30,000 vehicles.
